title: Global Outlook: Our CIOs on Modern Mercantilism, AI, and Managing Money Today
text:
Research & Insights

Global Outlook: Our CIOs on Modern Mercantilism, AI, and Managing Money Today

By Karen Karniol-Tambour, Greg Jensen, Bob Prince, Jim Haskel

In an excerpt from our Q4 CIO call, Karen Karniol-Tambour, Greg Jensen, and Bob Prince describe the new investment regime—defined by AI and modern mercantilism—and share how investors can build a resilient portfolio in the current environment.Karen describes the new investment regime we’re in today, discusses the risks we see ahead, and walks through the critical questions we’re watching to determine how these dynamics will play out going forward.Greg discusses our approach to understanding AI and why the next chapter of the AI boom is more dangerous.Bob shares how investors can build resilient portfolios in the current environment.All investing involves risk, including loss of principal; please see important disclosures and other information.
